entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: ICGV-SM 90704
entities.description: A specific groundnut genotype evaluated for rosette resistance.

entities.name: ICG 12991
entities.description: A specific groundnut genotype evaluated for rosette resistance.

entities.name: JL 24
entities.description: A specific groundnut genotype evaluated for rosette resistance.

entities.name: MALIMBA
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar used as the source of rosette infection.

entities.name: ROSETTE
entities.description: A disease in groundnuts caused by a complex of viruses and satellite RNA.

entities.name: ROSETTE ASSISTOR VIRUS
entities.description: One of the viral components causing the rosette disease.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROSETTE VIRUS
entities.description: One of the viral components causing the rosette disease.

entities.name: SATELLITE RNA
entities.description: A component of the virus complex that contributes to the rosette disease.

entities.name: APHIS CRACCIVORA
entities.description: The aphid species that acts as a vector for the rosette virus complex.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist infection or vector infestation.

entities.name: ROSETTE SYMPTOMS
entities.description: The physical manifestations of the rosette disease in groundnut plants.

entities.name: VECTOR TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process of transmitting the virus using an insect vector.

entities.name: MECHANICAL TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process of transmitting the virus through physical means.

entities.name: GRAFTING
entities.description: A technique used to transmit the virus by joining tissues of an infected plant to a healthy one.

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where the experiments were conducted.

entities.name: APHID POPULATION COUNTS
entities.description: The measurement of the number of aphids present on the plants to assess vector performance.

entities.name: DISEASE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The degree to which the disease manifests in the plant.
